title: Geometry Preview Images Events
description: Events published by the Geometry Service for 6-side + isometric preview images

PreviewImagesGeneratedEvent.description: Published when 6-side preview images are generated for a 3D file

storagePath.description: Original 3D file storage path (used as join key with OrderFile)

previewImages.description: Preview images for 6 sides of the 3D model

front.description: GCS storage path to front preview PNG

left.description: GCS storage path to left preview PNG

right.description: GCS storage path to right preview PNG

back.description: GCS storage path to back preview PNG

top.description: GCS storage path to top preview PNG

bottom.description: GCS storage path to bottom preview PNG

iso.description: GCS storage path to isometric preview PNG

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when preview images were generated

failed.description: True when preview image generation failed; consumers should transition to Failed state
